case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. YOUNG, ALFRED et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, ALFRED DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNG, ALFRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, ALFRED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 870 OAK ST, #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-11-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, SECURITY DEPOSITS, IF ANY, SHALL BE PERMANENTLY RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF, AND IF DEFENDANT VACATES PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 5/11/99 AND FULFILLS EACH OF THE AGREED UPON TERMS OF JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
